summary: End-to-end testing of AI Film Production Tracker MVP. 15/15 backend pytest cases passed. Full frontend Playwright flow (FilmsList -> Unseen card -> 41-shot grid in correct natural-sort order -> filter ACT 1=18 / FINAL=13 -> click shot 12 -> Add Iteration modal validation -> create FINAL iteration with thumbnail upload -> verify status promoted to FINAL and thumbnail surfaces on grid card) all passed.
critical_code_review_comments: FilmsList shows brief flash of empty grid (only '+ New Film' card) while loading=true before films load. Consider rendering a 'Loading…' placeholder when loading && films.length===0 (currently only an empty state shows after load).

Iteration validation: Pydantic accepts decision values from Literal but trim-validation is only done on what_failed/what_worked. prompt_text can be empty string at API level (FE validates it). Minor: backend could also enforce non-empty prompt_text for symmetry.
Backend uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event hooks (startup/shutdown). Consider lifespan handlers in future.
ShotGrid filter for 'CUT' is hidden when count===0 in summary, but filter dropdown still lists CUT — fine, but counts.CUT==1 is always shown for Unseen so OK.
No pagination on /api/films/{id}/shots — fine for 41 shots; limit 10000 hardcoded.
Mongo _id is correctly excluded via projection {'_id': 0} on every read. Good.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds Unseen + 41 shots automatically on startup if films collection empty. Tests created and cleaned up TEST_* films/shots/iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_film_tracker.py covers Films CRUD+cascade, Shots count(41)+ordering(01,02,...,07A,07B,...,21,21A,21B,...,35)+status distribution (13 FINAL/6 IP/21 NS/1 CUT)+ACT 1=18, Iteration validation (what_failed/worked required), attempt_number auto-increment, FINAL promotes thumbnail, FINAL shots don't auto-downgrade, delete decrements attempt_count. Frontend Playwright flow validated all 6 spec verification points. Frontend URL is REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://stage-confirm.preview.emergentagent.com (different from problem statement URL but per .env which is source of truth).
